sentences.target: On prend cet escalier, pas l'ascenseur.

translations.fr: On prend cet escalier, pas l'ascenseur.
translations.en: We take this staircase, not the elevator.
translations.es: Vamos por esta escalera, no por el ascensor.
translations.de: Wir nehmen diese Treppe, nicht den Aufzug.
translations.ko: 우리는 엘리베이터 말고 이 계단을 이용해요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们走这段楼梯，不坐电梯。
translations.yue: 我哋行呢條樓梯，唔搭升降機。
translations.ru: Пойдём по этой лестнице, а не на лифте.
translations.pt: Vamos por esta escada, não pelo elevador.
translations.he: אנחנו הולכים במדרגות האלה, לא במעלית.
translations.vi: Chúng ta đi cầu thang này, không đi thang máy.
translations.nl: We nemen deze trap, niet de lift.
translations.uk: Ми йдемо цими сходами, а не ліфтом.
translations.hu: Ezt a lépcsőt használjuk, nem a liftet.
translations.hi: हम इस सीढ़ी से जाते हैं, लिफ्ट से नहीं.
translations.pl: Idziemy tymi schodami, a nie windą.
translations.el: Πάμε από αυτή τη σκάλα, όχι με το ασανσέρ.
translations.nb: Vi tar denne trappen, ikke heisen.
translations.id: Kita lewat tangga ini, bukan lift.
translations.sv: Vi tar den här trappan, inte hissen.
translations.cs: Jdeme po těchto schodech, ne výtahem.
translations.da: Vi tager denne trappe, ikke elevatoren.
translations.fi: Menemme tätä portaikkoa pitkin, emme hissillä.
translations.ja: エレベーターではなく、この階段を使います。

tokens.explanation: Indefinite subject pronoun; here the grammatical subject of the clause, taking 3rd person singular agreement.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person singular, selecting a direct object ('cet escalier').
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular form used before a vowel sound; modifies 'escalier'.
Common masculine noun; direct object of 'prend'.
Negation adverb; used contrastively here to reject the alternative ('l'ascenseur'); the optional 'ne' is omitted.
Definite article 'le' elided before a vowel-initial noun; determiner for 'ascenseur'.
Common masculine noun; the contrasted option after 'pas'.

sentences.target: Je t'attends près de cet escalier.

translations.fr: Je t'attends près de cet escalier.
translations.en: I’m waiting for you near this staircase.
translations.es: Te espero cerca de esta escalera.
translations.de: Ich warte auf dich in der Nähe dieser Treppe.
translations.it: Ti aspetto vicino a questa scala.
translations.ko: 이 계단 근처에서 너를 기다리고 있어.
translations.zh-Hans: 我在这段楼梯附近等你。
translations.yue: 我喺呢條樓梯附近等你。
translations.ru: Я жду тебя возле этой лестницы.
translations.pt: Estou à tua espera perto desta escada.
translations.he: אני מחכה לך ליד המדרגות האלה.
translations.vi: Tôi đang đợi bạn gần cầu thang này.
translations.nl: Ik wacht op je bij deze trap.
translations.uk: Я чекаю на тебе біля цих сходів.
translations.hi: मैं इस सीढ़ी के पास तुम्हारा इंतज़ार कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Czekam na ciebie przy tych schodach.
translations.el: Σε περιμένω κοντά σε αυτή τη σκάλα.
translations.nb: Jeg venter på deg ved denne trappen.
translations.id: Saya menunggu kamu di dekat tangga ini.
translations.sv: Jag väntar på dig vid den här trappan.
translations.cs: Čekám na tebe u těchto schodů.
translations.da: Jeg venter på dig ved denne trappe.
translations.ja: この階段の近くであなたを待っています。

tokens.explanation: 1st person singular subject pronoun; grammatical subject of the verb.
Clitic object pronoun (2nd person singular), elided before a vowel-initial verb; direct object of 'attends'.
Main verb, present indicative 1st person singular; takes 't'' as its object.
Adverb functioning in the complex preposition 'près de' to express proximity.
Preposition completing 'près de'; introduces the locative complement.
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular before vowel sound; modifies 'escalier'.
Common masculine noun; object of the preposition 'de' (complement of 'près').

sentences.target: Les enfants descendent cet escalier trop vite.

translations.fr: Les enfants descendent cet escalier trop vite.
translations.en: The children go down this staircase too fast.
translations.es: Los niños bajan por esta escalera demasiado rápido.
translations.de: Die Kinder gehen diese Treppe zu schnell hinunter.
translations.it: I bambini scendono questa scala troppo velocemente.
translations.ko: 아이들이 이 계단을 너무 빨리 내려가요.
translations.zh-Hans: 孩子们下这段楼梯太快了。
translations.yue: 啲小朋友落呢條樓梯太快。
translations.ru: Дети слишком быстро спускаются по этой лестнице.
translations.pt: As crianças descem esta escada rápido demais.
translations.he: הילדים יורדים במדרגות האלה מהר מדי.
translations.tr: Çocuklar bu merdivenden çok hızlı iniyor.
translations.vi: Bọn trẻ xuống cầu thang này quá nhanh.
translations.ar: الأطفال ينزلون هذا الدرج بسرعة كبيرة.
translations.nl: De kinderen gaan te snel deze trap af.
translations.uk: Діти надто швидко спускаються цими сходами.
translations.hu: A gyerekek túl gyorsan mennek le ezen a lépcsőn.
translations.hi: बच्चे इस सीढ़ी से बहुत तेज़ नीचे जा रहे हैं.
translations.pl: Dzieci schodzą po tych schodach za szybko.
translations.el: Τα παιδιά κατεβαίνουν αυτή τη σκάλα πολύ γρήγορα.
translations.nb: Barna går ned denne trappen altfor fort.
translations.id: Anak-anak menuruni tangga ini terlalu cepat.
translations.sv: Barnen går ner för den här trappan alldeles för fort.
translations.ro: Copiii coboară pe această scară prea repede.
translations.cs: Děti scházejí po těchто schodech příliš rychle.
translations.da: Børnene går ned ad denne trappe alt for hurtigt.
translations.fi: Lapset laskeutuvat tätä portaikkoa liian nopeasti.
translations.ja: 子どもたちはこの階段を降りるのが速すぎます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; determiner for 'enfants'.
Plural common noun; grammatical subject of 'descendent'.
Main verb, present indicative 3rd person plural; takes 'cet escalier' as direct object ('go down').
Demonstrative determiner, masculine singular before vowel sound; modifies 'escalier'.
Common masculine noun; direct object of 'descendent'.
Degree adverb intensifying 'vite' ('too fast').
Adverb of manner modifying 'descendent'.

sentences.target: Il y a un escalier derrière le magasin.
sentences.reading: /il i a œ̃n‿ɛskalje dɛʁjɛʁ lə maɡazɛ̃/

translations.fr: Il y a un escalier derrière le magasin.
translations.ipa: /il i a œ̃n‿ɛskalje dɛʁjɛʁ lə maɡazɛ̃/
translations.en: There is a staircase behind the store.
translations.es: Hay una escalera detrás de la tienda.
translations.de: Hinter dem Geschäft gibt es eine Treppe.
translations.it: Dietro al negozio c’è una scala.
translations.pt: Há uma escada atrás da loja.
translations.vi: Có một cầu thang phía sau cửa hàng.
translations.nl: Achter de winkel is een trap.
translations.hu: A bolt mögött van egy lépcső.
translations.hi: दुकान के पीछे एक सीढ़ी है.
translations.el: Πίσω από το μαγαζί υπάρχει μια σκάλα.
translations.nb: Det er en trapp bak butikken.
translations.id: Di belakang toko ada sebuah tangga.
translations.ro: În spatele magazinului este o scară.
translations.da: Der er en trappe bag butikken.
translations.ja: 店の裏に階段があります。

tokens.explanation: Impersonal subject pronoun; part of the existential construction 'il y a'.
Locative clitic pronoun; with 'il' and 'a' forms the existential 'there is/are'.
Verb, present indicative 3rd person singular; in 'il y a' expresses existence ('there is/are').
Indefinite article; determiner for 'escalier'.
Common masculine noun; notional entity whose existence is asserted in the clause.
Preposition introducing a locative complement.
Definite article; determiner for 'magasin'.
Common masculine noun; object of the preposition 'derrière'.
